name: @skintyee/api
description: Skin Tyee API — NestJS implementation of the OpenAPI contract (in-memory data layer for the POC).

scripts.db:backup:prod:list: az postgres flexible-server backup list --resource-group skintyee-prod-rg --name skintyee-prod-pg --query "reverse(sort_by([], &completedTime))[].{name:name, type:backupType, completedTime:completedTime}" -o table
scripts._comment:db:dump:prod: pg_dump-based snapshot. On-demand server-side backups need a non-Burstable SKU; pg_dump works regardless. Requires psql client + an active firewall rule for your IP (see scripts/grant-pg-firewall.sh).
scripts.db:dump:prod: mkdir -p backups && PGSSLMODE=require pg_dump --no-owner --no-acl --format=custom "$(az containerapp show --name api-prod --resource-group skintyee-prod-rg --query 'properties.template.containers[0].env[?name==`DATABASE_URL`].value' -o tsv 2>/dev/null || echo)" -f "backups/skintyee-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ).dump" && ls -lh backups/skintyee-*.dump | tail -1
